ddls:
CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "church_id" INTEGER /* ID of the church where the appointment is made */,
  "clergy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clergy member being appointed */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position being appointed to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the appointment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the appointment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the appointment (e.g., active, pending, terminated) */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., full-time, part-time, temporary) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the appointment */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the appointment was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_clergy_id FOREIGN KEY ("clergy_id") REFERENCES clergy_members ("clergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_church_id FOREIGN KEY ("church_id") REFERENCES churches ("church_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churches" (
  "church_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each church */,
  "church_name" TEXT /* Name of the church */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the church belongs to */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the church belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the church */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the church */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the church's website */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the church was founded */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Current number of members in the church */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("church_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_churches_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_churches_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clergy_members" (
  "clergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clergy member */,
  "clergy_name" TEXT /* Full name of the clergy member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the clergy member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the clergy member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the clergy member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the clergy member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the clergy member */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "ordination_date" TEXT /* Date when the clergy member was ordained */,
  "ordination_church" TEXT /* Church where the clergy member was ordained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clergy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Pastor, Associate Pastor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "is_leadership" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the position is a leadership role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed responsibilities associated with the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the conference office */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the conference */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the conference's website */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the conference was founded */,
  "number_of_churches" INTEGER /* Current number of churches in the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the district office */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the district */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the district's website */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the district was founded */,
  "number_of_churches" INTEGER /* Current number of churches in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "GCNO" (
  "GCNO_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GCNO */,
  "clergy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clergy member the GCNO belongs to */,
  "GCNO_number" INTEGER /* GCNO number */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date when the GCNO was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the GCNO expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("GCNO_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_GCNO_clergy_id FOREIGN KEY ("clergy_id") REFERENCES clergy_members ("clergy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, clergy member) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "clergy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clergy member the history belongs to */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appointment the history entry is for */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the appointment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment in the history (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in the appointment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_history_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_history_clergy_id FOREIGN KEY ("clergy_id") REFERENCES clergy_members ("clergy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_for" INTEGER /* ID of the user or entity the report was generated for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_for FOREIGN KEY ("generated_for") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_views" (
  "chart_view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart view event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the chart */,
  "chart_view_date" TEXT /* Date when the chart was viewed */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart viewed */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart viewed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the chart view in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
